_meta.description: 43 元件完整 datasheet 數據集，每筆數據交叉比對三項可靠來源
_meta.methodology: 官方 datasheet + 官方 EDA 封裝圖 + 實測/社群驗證

physical.notes: Non-rectangular outline with USB-B and barrel jack protrusions

sources.name: Arduino A000066 Product Page + Schematic PDF

physical.notes: 30-pin or 38-pin variants exist; 30-pin (2×15) is most common DevKitC V4. length_mm=51.45 is Phase A-1 ESTIMATED (DOIT community clone, no official Gerber/EAGLE; common cited value 51.45mm, needs caliper verification per problem.md E6)
Official Raspberry Pi 4 Model B mechanical drawing

sources.name: Raspberry Pi 4 Model B Product Brief

on_board_components.name: VL805
on_board_components.desc: VIA VL805 USB 3.0 host controller [near USB ports]
on_board_components.label: VL805

on_board_components.name: microSD
on_board_components.desc: microSD card slot [PDF left edge, mid-height]
on_board_components.label: microSD

on_board_components.name: DSI-Display
on_board_components.desc: 15-pin DSI display FPC connector [PDF left area]
on_board_components.label: DSI-Display

physical.notes: Edge connector with 25 pads (5 large ring + 20 small)

on_board_components.name: nRF52833
on_board_components.desc: Nordic nRF52833 BLE MCU [Avnet back side]
on_board_components.label: nRF52833

on_board_components.name: KL27Z
on_board_components.desc: NXP KL27Z USB interface MCU [Avnet back side, near USB]
on_board_components.label: KL27Z

on_board_components.name: BTN-A
on_board_components.desc: User button A [Avnet front left of LED matrix]
on_board_components.label: BTN-A

on_board_components.name: BTN-B
on_board_components.desc: User button B [Avnet front right of LED matrix]
on_board_components.label: BTN-B

on_board_components.name: Microphone
on_board_components.desc: MEMS microphone SPU0410 [V2 front, near speaker]
on_board_components.label: Microphone

on_board_components.name: Touch-Logo
on_board_components.desc: Capacitive touch logo [V2 front center, above LED]
on_board_components.label: Touch-Logo

physical.notes: Pin 3 (NC) is not connected

electrical.current_typ_notes: DHT22 typical measuring current per Aosong datasheet; standby 50uA

physical.notes: Two 'eyes' protrude ~10mm above PCB

header_groups.name: MAIN
header_groups.notes: 4-pin header on rear edge, between transducers

physical.notes: Circular PCB, dome sits on top. Two trim pots for sensitivity and delay.

header_groups.name: MAIN
header_groups.notes: 3-pin header at bottom edge. Pin order varies by manufacturer — most common: VCC-OUT-GND left-to-right

physical.notes: Capacitive type (corrosion resistant, unlike resistive). Probe area ~60mm long.

identity.package: Plastic housing with mounting ears + 3-wire cable

physical.notes: Body 23×12.2×22.7mm, ears extend width to ~32.5mm, shaft adds ~9mm height

electrical.current_typ_notes: SG90 typical light-load operating current per ServoDatabase/Adafruit; below 200mA running and 500mA stall

on_board_components.label: Servo Body
on_board_components.notes: SG90 plastic housing. Body 23×22.7mm, mounting ears extend width to ~32.5mm.

on_board_components.label: Mount Ear L
on_board_components.notes: Left mounting ear with M2 hole

on_board_components.label: Mount Ear R
on_board_components.notes: Right mounting ear with M2 hole

on_board_components.label: Output Shaft
on_board_components.notes: Plastic output horn hub, protrudes from top face ~9mm

on_board_components.label: 3-Wire Cable
on_board_components.notes: 3-wire JR/Futaba connector on rear cable exit: Brown=GND, Red=VCC, Orange=SIG

physical.notes: Motor body ~25×20×15mm, gearbox adds ~45mm length

on_board_components.label: Motor Body
on_board_components.notes: FA-130 cylindrical motor can + gearbox. No PCB. Metal can ~25mm, gearbox ~45mm.

on_board_components.label: Output Shaft
on_board_components.notes: D-cut 5mm dia output shaft, protrudes from gearbox end

identity.full_name: L298N Dual H-Bridge Motor Driver Module

physical.notes: Dual channel; heatsink on L298N IC

electrical.notes: ~2V voltage drop across driver; per-channel 2A max

on_board_components.label: L298N
on_board_components.notes: L298N dual H-bridge IC (Multiwatt-15), center of board

on_board_components.label: Heatsink
on_board_components.notes: Aluminum heatsink clipped to L298N package

on_board_components.label: MOTOR-A
on_board_components.notes: 2-pin screw terminal, Motor A output (OUT1/OUT2), top-left area

on_board_components.label: MOTOR-B
on_board_components.notes: 2-pin screw terminal, Motor B output (OUT3/OUT4), top-right area

on_board_components.label: PWR-IN
on_board_components.notes: 3-pin screw terminal: VCC/GND/5V, bottom-left corner

on_board_components.label: LOGIC
on_board_components.notes: 6-pin 2.54mm header: ENA/IN1/IN2/IN3/IN4/ENB, bottom-center

on_board_components.label: ENA-JMP
on_board_components.notes: ENA jumper (bypasses ENA header pin, enables channel A at 100%)

on_board_components.label: ENB-JMP
on_board_components.notes: ENB jumper (bypasses ENB header pin, enables channel B at 100%)

on_board_components.label: 5V-REG
on_board_components.notes: 78M05 / LM7805 onboard 5V regulator (when VCC > 7V)

on_board_components.label: PWR-LED
on_board_components.notes: Green LED, power-on indicator

physical.notes: Motor is round (28mm dia), driver PCB is rectangular. Combined dims are for enclosure estimation.

on_board_components.label: ULN2003A
on_board_components.notes: ULN2003A Darlington array IC (DIP-16), left-center of driver PCB

on_board_components.label: LED-IN1
on_board_components.notes: Phase indicator LED for IN1

on_board_components.label: LED-IN2
on_board_components.notes: Phase indicator LED for IN2

on_board_components.label: LED-IN3
on_board_components.notes: Phase indicator LED for IN3

on_board_components.label: LED-IN4
on_board_components.notes: Phase indicator LED for IN4

on_board_components.label: MOTOR-CONN
on_board_components.notes: 5-pin JST or ZH connector for 28BYJ-48 motor cable, right side of PCB

on_board_components.label: INPUT-HDR
on_board_components.notes: 6-pin 2.54mm header at bottom: IN1/IN2/IN3/IN4/VCC/GND

identity.driver: S8050 NPN transistor + 1N4007 flyback diode + optocoupler (some models)
identity.package: PCB module with 3-pin input header + 3-position screw terminal

physical.notes: Screw terminal on top edge for high-voltage side (COM/NO/NC)

electrical.notes: Some modules are active-LOW (optocoupler isolated), some active-HIGH

on_board_components.label: SRD-05VDC
on_board_components.notes: Songle SRD-05VDC-SL-C relay body (19×15.5×15.5mm), center-right

on_board_components.label: S8050/Opto
on_board_components.notes: S8050 NPN driver transistor or optocoupler (EL817), left side

on_board_components.label: 1N4007
on_board_components.notes: 1N4007 flyback diode across relay coil

on_board_components.label: STATUS-LED
on_board_components.notes: Green LED, relay-activated status indicator

on_board_components.label: INPUT-HDR
on_board_components.notes: 3-pin 2.54mm header: VCC/GND/IN, bottom-left

on_board_components.label: SCREW-TERM
on_board_components.notes: 3-pos 5.08mm screw terminal: COM/NO/NC, top-right for high-voltage connection

physical.notes: Submersible design, outlet tube on top

electrical.notes: Requires relay or MOSFET for MCU control, cannot drive directly from GPIO

cross_component.note: 由繼電器 COM/NO 供電

on_board_components.label: Pump Body
on_board_components.notes: Sealed ABS submersible housing. No PCB. 45×30×25mm.

on_board_components.label: Outlet Tube
on_board_components.notes: 8mm dia outlet pipe on top face

physical.notes: Some variants are 27.3×27.8mm. 4-pin I2C and 7-pin SPI versions exist.

identity.package: PCB module with I2C backpack soldered

physical.notes: I2C backpack adds ~3mm to height. Without backpack, 16-pin parallel header.

header_groups.name: I2C_HEADER
header_groups.notes: I2C backpack header, top edge of PCB

identity.package: PCB module with 8-pin SPI header + FPC cable
PCB module with 8×8 LED matrix + SPI header

physical.notes: Chainable — DOUT header on opposite side from DIN
Nearly square. MicroSD card slot on bottom face.

electrical.current_typ_notes: DFPlayer Mini typical normal-volume playback per DFRobot Wiki; between 20mA standby and 200mA max

header_groups.name: LEFT_COL
header_groups.notes: Pin 1 at top-left. YX5200 DIP-16 left column.

header_groups.name: RIGHT_COL
header_groups.notes: Pin 16 at top-right, Pin 9 at bottom-right (DIP convention).

on_board_components.label: YX5200 / MH2024K
on_board_components.notes: YX5200-24SS or MH2024K-24SS MP3/DAC IC, SOP-24, center of 20.7×20.7mm PCB

on_board_components.label: SD-CARD
on_board_components.notes: MicroSD card slot on bottom face (slide-in), center-left

on_board_components.label: LEFT-HDR
on_board_components.notes: 8-pin 2.54mm male header, left side: pins 1-8 (VCC/RX/TX/DAC_R/DAC_L/SPK1/GND/SPK2)

on_board_components.label: RIGHT-HDR
on_board_components.notes: 8-pin 2.54mm male header, right side: pins 9-16 (IO1/GND/IO2/ADKEY1/ADKEY2/USB+/USB-/BUSY)

identity.package: Round metal frame with cone + 2 wire leads

physical.notes: Round shape. No mounting holes — typically glued or press-fit.

electrical.voltage_note: Passive transducer: no DC operating voltage. Spec'd by impedance (8 ohm) and power handling (0.5W). AC signal-driven; DC would damage the voice coil.

on_board_components.label: Speaker Cone
on_board_components.notes: 36mm round paper/mylar cone speaker. Metal frame rim. No PCB.

on_board_components.label: Magnet
on_board_components.notes: Permanent magnet assembly at rear of speaker

physical.notes: Cylindrical body. '+' marking on top for polarity.

electrical.notes: Active = has internal oscillator, just apply voltage to make sound

on_board_components.label: Buzzer Body
on_board_components.notes: Cylindrical active buzzer body 12mm dia, 9.5mm height. Internal oscillator ~2.7kHz.

on_board_components.label: Driver PCB
on_board_components.notes: Small PCB inside base with oscillator IC and coupling capacitor

electrical.notes: Passive = needs external PWM signal to generate tone. Frequency of PWM determines pitch.

on_board_components.label: Buzzer Body
on_board_components.notes: Cylindrical passive piezo buzzer body 12mm dia, 8.5mm height. No oscillator, requires external PWM.

physical.notes: Empty holder ~8g, each AA cell ~24g

electrical.notes: 2×AA in series = 3.0V nominal (not 6V). 4×AA = 6V is a different holder.

on_board_components.label: AA Holder
on_board_components.notes: Injection-molded ABS 2×AA battery holder. No PCB. Spring contacts inside.

on_board_components.label: Spring-
on_board_components.notes: Negative spring contact at left end (battery GND)

on_board_components.label: Spring+
on_board_components.notes: Positive contact tab at right end (battery V+)

identity.package: Soft pouch cell with JST-PH 2.0 connector

physical.notes: 503450 = 5.0mm thick × 34mm wide × 50mm long

identity.package: Small PCB with USB-A female + screw terminal or header

electrical.notes: USB 2.0 spec limits to 500mA; USB 3.0 allows 900mA. power source: typ_ma=0 by design (avoid double-counting in phase3 active sum)

on_board_components.label: USB-A IN
on_board_components.notes: USB-A female socket (host-side power input), left end of PCB

on_board_components.label: 5V Reg
on_board_components.notes: Voltage regulator/filter IC (AMS1117-5.0 or similar), center PCB

on_board_components.label: OUT-HDR
on_board_components.notes: 2-pin 2.54mm header output (VCC/GND), right side

on_board_components.label: OUT-TERM
on_board_components.notes: 2-pos screw terminal output, far right

on_board_components.label: PWR-LED
on_board_components.notes: Green power-on LED indicator

physical.notes: 4 pins: A1-A2 are internally connected, B1-B2 are internally connected. Pressing bridges A-B.

electrical.notes: Needs external pull-up or pull-down resistor. Arduino INPUT_PULLUP works. current_typ_ma=0.5 (INPUT_PULLUP idle 0; press 50mA*50ms duty avg)

on_board_components.label: SPDT Toggle
on_board_components.notes: MTS-102 SPDT toggle switch. Panel-mount with M6 bushing. Actuator extends top.

identity.notes: Duplicate of Switch-class in registry for backwards compatibility

electrical.notes: 3 pins: Pin 1 (VCC) → Wiper → Pin 3 (GND). Wiper output is analog voltage.
Center position ≈ VCC/2 on both axes

identity.full_name: IR Remote Control Receiver Module (VS1838B / TSOP1838)

physical.notes: Often comes with IR remote handset. Receiver module only listed here.

electrical.notes: AOUT = analog voltage proportional to light, DOUT = digital threshold (adjustable via trim pot)

identity.ic: LM393 comparator + IR LED + IR phototransistor

electrical.notes: Adjustable detection range via trim pot

physical.notes: Bare IC, DIP-8 JEDEC MS-001 package. Often used on breakout board.

electrical.output: Analog (DC level per band, multiplexed via STROBE/RESET)

registry_discrepancies.registry_value: Non-standard coordinates (VCC at x=2.0 y=0.0, etc.)
registry_discrepancies.correct_value: DIP-8 pin numbering with row_spacing=7.62mm, pin_pitch=2.54mm
registry_discrepancies.reason: REGISTRY 座標使用直觀但非標準的配置。DIP-8 封裝腳位應遵循 JEDEC MS-001：Pin 1-4 左列, Pin 5-8 右列, row spacing 7.62mm
registry_discrepancies.fix: 校正 pin 座標為標準 DIP-8 layout

physical.notes: Longest lead = Cathode (GND). Flat side of lens indicates Cathode.

electrical.notes: Each color needs its own current-limiting resistor (typ. 220Ω for 5V)
electrical.current_typ_notes: Single color at 20mA; total depends on color mix

identity.package: Flexible PCB strip with adhesive backing

identity.model: WS2812B (5050 RGB LED with integrated driver)

physical.notes: 8 LEDs on 50mm strip. Each LED independently addressable.

identity.package: Enclosed PCB module with AC input / DC output

on_board_components.label: HLK-PM01
on_board_components.notes: Enclosed AC-DC module (Hi-Link HLK-PM01 or equiv). Potted resin, no exposed components.

on_board_components.label: AC-INPUT
on_board_components.notes: AC L/N input screw terminal pair on left face

on_board_components.label: DC-OUTPUT
on_board_components.notes: DC+ / DC- output screw terminal pair on right face

physical.notes: Multiple mounting holes for sensors, MCU, battery, driver board

electrical.voltage_note: Structural component: acrylic/metal plate + motors + wheels, no onboard electronics and no intrinsic operating voltage.

identity.model: 20mm ceramic piezo disc atomizer + driver board

physical.notes: Disc must be submerged in water to operate

on_board_components.label: Piezo Disc
on_board_components.notes: 20mm ceramic piezoelectric disc, must be submerged. Centered on 25×25mm PCB.

on_board_components.label: Osc Driver
on_board_components.notes: 113kHz oscillator driver IC on driver PCB, drives piezo disc

on_board_components.label: VCC/GND
on_board_components.notes: 2-pin wire/header: VCC and GND, bottom-left

on_board_components.label: Ultrasonic Disc
on_board_components.notes: 1.7MHz ultrasonic piezo transducer, sealed/waterproofed. Center of 35×35mm assembly.

on_board_components.label: Driver IC
on_board_components.notes: High-frequency oscillator driver IC on driver board, 1.7MHz

on_board_components.label: VCC/GND
on_board_components.notes: 2-pin wire/header: VCC and GND, bottom-left

voltage_operating_v.basis: RPi4 Model B: 5V DC via USB-C
HC-SR501 VCC 4.5-20V, 5V recommended (3.3 was OUT logic level, not supply)

thermal_mw.basis: legacy estimate ~3.3V x 1mA; research V*I~1.5mW (LOW conf) not adopted

voltage_operating_v.basis: L298N logic VSS 4.5-7V (5V); 7.0 was motor-supply VS min for onboard regulator
5mm RGB Vf: R~2.0V, G/B~3.4V @20mA; 3.3 ~= G/B channel

thermal_mw.basis: single-channel typ ~40-68mW; full-RGB up to ~176mW; 100 retained as mid estimate

voltage_operating_v.basis: 5mm white LED Vf ~3.2V @20mA; 3.3 within typ range

thermal_mw.basis: derived V*I: 3.2V x 20mA typ operating (max-rated Pd 100-120mW)
derived V*I: 5V x ~5mA at resonance (max 30mA, drive-dependent)

voltage_operating_v.basis: rail-dependent passive contact; 5V logic nominal (max-rated 12V DC / 50mA)

thermal_mw.basis: passive contact; negligible at logic currents
passive power source; negligible self-heating at typical draw
sources: derived: passive source, no active dissipation | n/a

thermal_mw.basis: passive power source; negligible self-heating at typical draw
sources: derived: passive source, no active dissipation | n/a

thermal_mw.basis: supply conversion loss estimate (light-load); not a datasheet spec

voltage_operating_v.basis: passive/structural — no DC operating voltage; kept in specs-cache _fallback
passive/structural — no DC operating voltage; kept in specs-cache _fallback
